note: Candidate built from loopback HTTP capture. Raw PCAP and raw JSON remain local-only.

redaction.strategy: Loopback-only capture. 127.0.0.1 endpoints retained because they are non-routable localhost evidence.

frames.stageHintReason: TCP SYN starts the localhost HTTP connection.
TCP SYN/ACK accepts the localhost HTTP connection.
TCP ACK/maintenance frame around the plaintext HTTP exchange.

TCP segment carries plaintext HTTP response bytes or reassembled body data.
TCP ACK/maintenance frame around the plaintext HTTP exchange.
Plain HTTP response/status is readable on the wire.
TCP ACK/maintenance frame around the plaintext HTTP exchange.

frames.stageHintReason: TCP FIN/ACK closes the localhost HTTP connection.
